Dashboard Archive: 2026-03-05 Home
About This Dashboard
What It Does
Long-term momentum ranker scoring 700+ tickers on returns from 1 month to 10 years, with relative performance vs SPY over 1y/5y/10y. Same scoring engine as the short-term ranker but optimized for longer investment horizons and secular trends.
Today's Reading
# Market Analysis: Momentum-Ranker-Long Today's data reveals two exceptionally strong long-term performers at the top of the rankings. CF (rank 1, score 92.7) shows dominant momentum across all timeframes, with 10-year returns of 236.49% and consistent outperformance versus SPY (+30.11% over 1y, +67.3% over 5y), though its momentum signal of 2.01 flags it as "overextended." WWD demonstrates even more extreme long-term strength with 726.75% returns over 10 years and massive SPY outperformance of +478.33% over that same period, while maintaining all four moving average signals above current price. However, CF's negative 10-year performance versus QQQ (-248.03%) and IAU (-63.41%) suggests sector rotation effects, whereas WWD's positive correlations across both equity indices indicate broader market participation. The data shows these are genuine secular trend winners rather than narrow momentum spikes, though CF's "overextended" flag warrants caution about near-term pullback risk.
